Local Open Scope string_scope.

Module Multi.

(* < sh k. let a = k true in let b = k false in a && b > *)
Definition flip : ufun := fun _ =>
  rs (
    sh "k" (
      bind (unk "k" true) (fun r1 =>
      bind (unk "k" false) (fun r2 =>
        ens (fun r => \[r = vand r1 r2])
      )))).

Definition flip_env :=
  Fmap.single "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens (fun r => \[r = v]))).


forall (n : nat) (v1 : val),
flip_env ⊢ flip v1 ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]


forall (n : nat) (v1 : val),
flip_env ⊢ flip v1 ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env ⊢ flip v1 ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]
 
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (sh "k"
       (let r1 = unk "k" true
        in let r2 = unk "k" false
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (shc "k"
       (let r1 = unk "k" true
        in let r2 = unk "k" false
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
       (fun v : val => ens r. \[r = v]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ defun "k" (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]));;
  rs
    (let r1 = unk "k" true
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]


  (* rewrite entails_under_seq_defun_idem.
  2: { unfold flip_env. apply Fmap.indom_single. }
  2: { unfold flip_env. resolve_fn_in_env. } *)

  
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.indom flip_env "k"
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.read flip_env "k" =
(fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 = unk "k" true
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.indom flip_env "k"
 
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.indom
  (Fmap.single "k"
     (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))) "k"
 apply Fmap.indom_single. 
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.read flip_env "k" =
(fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 = unk "k" true
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.read flip_env "k" =
(fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))
 
n: nat
v1: val
Fmap.read
  (Fmap.single "k"
     (fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))) "k" =
(fun v : val => rs (ens r. \[r = v]))
 resolve_fn_in_env. 
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 = unk "k" true
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]


  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 = rs (ens r. \[r = true])
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r2 = unk "k" false
     in (ens r. \[r = vand true r2]))
⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
flip_env
⊢ rs
    (let r2 = rs (ens r. \[r = false])
     in (ens r. \[r = r2])) ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
env: Fmap.fmap string (val -> flow)
Heqenv: env = flip_env
env
⊢ rs
    (let r2 = rs (ens r. \[r = false])
     in (ens r. \[r = r2])) ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  
n: nat
v1: val
env: Fmap.fmap string (val -> flow)
Heqenv: env = flip_env
env ⊢ ens r. \[r = false] ⊆ ens r. \[r = false]

  reflexivity.
Qed.

End Multi.

Module Axioms.

(* Justified by [gnorm_bind_trivial] *)

forall f1 : flow,
let r2 = f1 in (ens r1. \[r1 = r2]) ⊑ f1


forall f1 : flow,
let r2 = f1 in (ens r1. \[r1 = r2]) ⊑ f1

  
f1: flow
let r2 = f1 in (ens r1. \[r1 = r2]) ⊑ f1

  
f1: flow
shift_free f1

  admit.
Admitted.


f1: flow
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val entails)
     entails) (bind f1)


f1: flow
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val entails)
     entails) (bind f1)

  
f1: flow
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val entails)
     entails) (bind f1)
 
f1: flow
ShiftFree f1

  admit.
Admitted.


f1: flow
Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f1)


f1: flow
Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f1)

  
f1: flow
Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f1)
 
f1: flow
ShiftFree f1

  admit.
Admitted.

(* Justified by [gnorm_bind_assoc] *)

forall (f : flow) (fk fk1 : val -> flow),
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x
⊑ let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x


forall (f : flow) (fk fk1 : val -> flow),
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x
⊑ let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

  
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
let x = let x = f in fk x in fk1 x
⊑ let r = f in let x = fk r in fk1 x

  
f: flow
fk, fk1: val -> flow
shift_free f

  admit.
Admitted.


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)


forall f1 f2 f3 : flow,
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
bientails (f1;; f2;; f3) ((f1;; f2);; f3)

  
f1, f2, f3: flow
shift_free f1

  admit.
Admitted.

End Axioms.

Module Toss.

(* let toss () =
  shift k.
    x := !x+1;
    let r1 = k true in
    x := !x+1;
    let r2 = k false in
    r1 + r2
*)
Definition toss : ufun := fun _ =>
  sh "k" (∀ x a,
    bind (req (x~~>vint a) (ens_ (x~~>(a+1));; unk "k" true)) (fun r1 =>
      ∀ b, bind (req (x~~>vint b) (ens_ (x~~>(b+1));; unk "k" false)) (fun r2 =>
        ens (fun r3 => \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))).

Definition toss_env :=
  Fmap.update
    (Fmap.single "toss" toss)
    "k" (fun v : val => rs (bind (ens (fun r => \[r = v]))
    (fun v => ens (fun r1 => \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0])))).

(* let flipi () = < let v = toss () in if v then 1 else 0 > *)
Definition flipi : flow :=
  rs (
    bind (unk "toss" vunit) (fun v =>
    ens (fun r1 => \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
  ).

Definition flipi_spec : flow :=
  ∀ x a, req (x~~>vint a) (ens (fun r => x~~>(a+2) \* \[r=1])).


toss_env ⊢ flipi ⊑ flipi_spec


toss_env ⊢ flipi ⊑ flipi_spec

  
toss_env ⊢ flipi ⊑ flipi_spec

  
toss_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = unk "toss" vunit
     in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])


  
toss_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = toss vunit
     in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])
 
toss_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     sh "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
     in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

  
toss_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     shc "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
       (fun v : val => ens r. \[r = v])
     in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

  
toss_env
⊢ rs
    (shc "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
       (fun v : val =>
        let v0 = ens r. \[r = v]
        in (ens r1. \[If v0 = true then r1 = 1
                      else r1 = 0])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])

  
toss_env
⊢ defun "k"
    (fun v : val =>
     rs
       (let v0 = ens r. \[r = v]
        in (ens r1. \[If v0 = true then r1 = 1
                      else r1 = 0])));;
  rs
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       let r1 =
       req (x ~~> a)
         (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a) (ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1])


  
Fmap.indom toss_env "k"
Fmap.read toss_env "k" =
(fun v : val =>
 rs
   (let v0 = ens r. \[r = v]
    in (ens r1. \[If v0 = true then r1 = 1 else r1 = 0])))

⊢ rs
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),

 rs

⊢ rs
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       let r1 =
       req (x ~~> a)

  rs
    (let r2 =

x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
toss_env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     req (x ~~> (a + 1))
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
        rs
          (let v = ens r. \[r = false]
           in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1
                         else r1 = 0])))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

env: Fmap.fmap string ufun
Heqenv: env = toss_env
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     req (x ~~> (a + 1))
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
        rs
          (let v = ens r. \[r = false]
           in (ens r1. \[If v = true then r1 = 1
                         else r1 = 0])))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]


  
x: loc
a: int
C: true = true
env: Fmap.fmap string ufun
Heqenv: env = toss_env
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  req (x ~~> (a + 1))
    (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
     rs
       (let r2 =
        ens r1. \[If false = true then r1 = 1
                  else r1 = 0]
        in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                      match r2 with
                      | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                      | _ => vunit
                      end])))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

a: int
C: true = true
env: Fmap.fmap string ufun
Heqenv: env = toss_env
C0: false <> true

⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  req (x ~~> (a + 1))
    (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1 + 1));;
     rs
       (let r2 = ens r1. \[r1 = 0]
        in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                      match r2 with
                      | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                      | _ => vunit
                      end])))
⊑ ens r. x ~~> (a + 2) \* \[r = 1]

(* let toss_n n =
  if n = 0 then
    true
  else
    let r1 = toss () in
    let r2 = toss_n (n - 1) in
    r1 && r2 *)
Definition toss_n : ufun := fun (n:val) =>
    (disj
      (ens (fun r => \[r = true /\ veq n 0]))
      (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
        bind (toss vunit) (fun r1 =>
        bind (unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)) (fun r2 =>
        ens (fun r => \[r = vand r1 r2]))))).

Definition toss_n_env :=
  let d :=
(fun v : val => ∀ n acc, rs (bind (bind (bind (ens (fun r : val => \[r = v])) (fun r1 : val => bind (unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)) (fun r2 : val => ens (fun r : val => \[r = vand r1 r2])))) (fun r2 : val => ens (fun r : val => \[r = vand acc r2]))) (fun v0 : val => ens (fun r : val => \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))))
  in
  Fmap.update (Fmap.single "toss_n" toss_n) "k" d.

(* an unsound lemma that we can't prove anyway *)

forall (s : Fmap.fmap var (val -> flow)) (x : var)
  (u1 u2 : val -> flow) (f1 f2 : flow),
Fmap.indom s x ->
Fmap.read s x = u1 ->
(forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v) ->
s ⊢ f1 ⊑ f2 -> s ⊢ defun x u2;; f1 ⊑ f2


forall (s : Fmap.fmap var (val -> flow)) (x : var)
  (u1 u2 : val -> flow) (f1 f2 : flow),
Fmap.indom s x ->
Fmap.read s x = u1 ->
(forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v) ->
s ⊢ f1 ⊑ f2 -> s ⊢ defun x u2;; f1 ⊑ f2

  
forall (s : Fmap.fmap var (val -> flow)) (x : var)
  (u1 u2 : val -> flow) (f1 f2 : flow),
Fmap.indom s x ->
Fmap.read s x = u1 ->
(forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 -> s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun x u2;; f1) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2

u1, u2: val -> flow
f1, f2: flow

s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 -> s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H3: s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (defun x u2;; f1)
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2

v: val

H12: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= f1

forall (s : Fmap.fmap string (val -> flow))
  (x : string) (u1 u2 : val -> flow) (f1 f2 : flow),
s = Fmap.single "x" u1 ->
x = "x" ->
u1 = (fun _ : val => ens r. \[r = 1]) ->
u2 = (fun _ : val => ens r. \[r = 1 \/ r = 2]) ->
f1 = unk "x" vunit ->
f2 = (ens r. \[r = 1]) ->
Fmap.indom s x ->
Fmap.read s x = u1 ->
(forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v) ->
s ⊢ f1 ⊑ f2 -> s ⊢ defun x u2;; f1 ⊑ f2

f1 = unk "x" vunit ->
f2 = (ens r. \[r = 1]) ->
Fmap.indom s x ->
Fmap.read s x = u1 ->
(forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v) ->
s ⊢ f1 ⊑ f2 -> s ⊢ defun x u2;; f1 ⊑ f2

H2: Fmap.read s x = u1
H3: forall v : val, u1 v ⊑ u2 v

s ⊢ defun x u2;; f1 ⊑ f2

  applys ent_seq_defun_idem_weaker H1 H2 H3 H4.
Qed.


forall (s : senv) (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f : flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val, P r -> s ⊢ ens_ H;; rs (fk r) ⊑ f) ->
s ⊢ ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x) ⊑ f


forall (s : senv) (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f : flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val, P r -> s ⊢ ens_ H;; rs (fk r) ⊑ f) ->
s ⊢ ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x) ⊑ f

  
forall (s : senv) (P : val -> Prop) (fk : val -> flow)
  (f : flow) (H : hprop),
(forall r : val,
 P r ->
 forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
 s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (ens_ H;; rs (let x = ens r. \[P r] in fk x)) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f

P r ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
h3: heap
v: val
s0: senv
H9: s, s0, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
v0: val
h0: heap
v1: val
H11: s0, s2, h0, h2, norm v0 |= fk v1
H7: exists (v : val) (h4 : heap),
  norm v1 = norm v /\
  \[P v] h4 /\
  h0 = h3 \u h4 /\ Fmap.disjoint h3 h4
s, s2, h1, h2, norm v0 |= f

    
s: senv
P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f: flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
h3: heap
v: val
s0: senv
H9: s, s0, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
v0, v2: val
H11: s0, s2, h3, h2, norm v0 |= fk v2
H1: P v2
H5: Fmap.disjoint h3 Fmap.empty
s, s2, h1, h2, norm v0 |= f

    
s: senv
P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f: flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
h3: heap
v: val
s0: senv
H9: s, s0, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
v0, v2: val
H11: s0, s2, h3, h2, norm v0 |= fk v2
H1: P v2
H5: Fmap.disjoint h3 Fmap.empty
s, s2, h1, h2, norm v0 |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk v2))

    
s: senv
P: val -> Prop
fk: val -> flow
f: flow
H: hprop
H0: forall r : val,
P r ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens_ H;; rs (fk r)) ->
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= f
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
h3: heap
v: val
s0: senv
H9: s, s0, h1, h3, norm v |= ens_ H
v0, v2: val
H11: s0, s2, h3, h2, norm v0 |= fk v2
H1: P v2
H5: Fmap.disjoint h3 Fmap.empty
s0, s2, h3, h2, norm v0 |= rs (fk v2)

    applys* s_rs_val.
Qed.

Import Axioms.


forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))


forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" n
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

toss_n_env

    (let v =

     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1

⊢ rs
    (let v =

     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = toss_n n
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     disj (ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0])
       (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
        let r1 = toss vunit
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
toss_n_env
⊢ disj
    (rs
       (let v =
        let r2 = ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0]
        in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
        in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
    (rs
       (let v =
        let r2 =
        ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
        let r1 = toss vunit
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
        in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
        in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

  R = norm v /\
  \[P v /\ P1] h3 /\
  h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3

     let r2 = ens_ \[veq n 0];; (ens r. \[r = true])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
    (∃ b : int,
       (ens r. x ~~> b \*
               \[b >= a + n /\
                 (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

a: int

H0: n >= 0
r: val
H1: If true = true then r = 1 else r = 0
C: ~ True

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

virel (fun x y : int => (x > y)%Z) n 0 ->

⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])

(n > 0)%Z ->
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
 
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 =
     sh "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 =
     shc "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
       (fun v : val => ens r. \[r = v])
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

    
n: int

downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     shc "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
       (fun v : val =>
        let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))

    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ defun "k"
    (fun v : val =>
     rs
       (let v0 =
        let r2 =
        let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
        in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
        in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0])));;
  rs
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       let r1 =
       req (x ~~> a)
         (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))

      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\

                    else r = 0)]))

forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env

H: (n > 0)%Z
Fmap.indom
  (Fmap.update (Fmap.single "toss_n" toss_n) "k"
     (fun v : val =>
      ∀ n acc : val,
        rs
          (let v0 =
           let r2 =
           let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
           in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
              in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
           in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
           in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                        else r = 0])))) "k"

v: val
Fmap.read
  (Fmap.single "k"
     (fun v : val =>
      ∀ n acc : val,
        rs
          (let v0 =
           let r2 =
           let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
           in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
              in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
           in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
           in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                        else r = 0]))) \u
   Fmap.single "toss_n" toss_n) "k" v
⊑ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

      
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
v: val
Fmap.read
  (Fmap.single "k"
     (fun v : val =>
      ∀ n acc : val,
        rs
          (let v0 =
           let r2 =
           let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
           in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
              in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
           in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
           in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                        else r = 0])))) "k" v
⊑ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 =
     let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

Fmap.indom
  (Fmap.single "k"

H: (n > 0)%Z
v: val
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= (∀ n acc : val,
      rs
        (let v0 =
         let r2 =
         let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
         in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
            in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
         in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
         in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                      else r = 0]))) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R
|= rs
     (let v =
      let r2 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
      in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       let r1 =
       req (x ~~> a)
         (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + n /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

a: int
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 =
     req (x ~~> a)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
        (∀ n acc : val,
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r2 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = true]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0]))))
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
    (∃ b : int,
       (ens r. x ~~> b \*
               \[b >= a + n /\
                 (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))


    
n: int
IH: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" y
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))

    req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + y /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))

          (∀ acc : val,
             rs
               (let v0 =
                let r2 =
                let r1 = ens r. \[r = true]
                in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub b 1)
                   in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
                in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
                in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                             else r = 0])))
          in (∀ b0 : int,

                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2]))))

    (∃ b : int,
       (ens r. x ~~> b \*
               \[b >= a + n /\
                 (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))

⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + y /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))

toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
     in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1
                  else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
    req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
      (∃ b : int,
         (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                 \[b >= a + (n - 1) /\
                   (If acc = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]))
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let r1 =
     ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
     rs
       (let v0 =
        let r2 =
        let r1 = ens r. \[r = true]
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
        in (ens r. \[r = (if acc then r2 else false)])
        in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0]))
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

    
n: int
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" y in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + y /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
toss_n_env
⊢ ∀ x0 : int,
    ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
    rs
      (let r1 =
       req (x ~~> x0 \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
         (∃ b : int,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[b >= x0 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If acc = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]))
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool

(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + y /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))

⊢ req \[a + 1 = a + 1]
    (ens_ \[];;
     req \[n - 1 >= 0]
       (∃ x0 : int,
          rs
            (let r1 =
             ens r. x ~~> x0 \*
                    \[x0 >= a + 1 + (n - 1) /\

                       else r = 0)]

                     (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                      unk "k" false)
                   in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))))

    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" y in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + y /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
toss_n_env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> a1);;
  rs
    (let r1 =
     ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

            Proper
              (respectful (entails_under toss_n_env)
                 (respectful ?r0 ?r)) bind]
            (internal placeholder) {?p}
 ?X13680==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 r |-
            Morphisms.ProperProxy ?r0
              (fun r2 : val =>
               ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2])]
            (internal placeholder) {?p0}
 ?X13681==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 |-
            Relation_Definitions.relation flow]
            (internal placeholder) {?r1}
 ?X13682==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2
            (do_subrelation:=Morphisms.do_subrelation)
            |-
            Proper
              (respectful
                 (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val ?r)
                 ?r1)
              (bind
                 (ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0]))]
            (internal placeholder) {?p1}
 ?X13683==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 |-
            Relation_Definitions.relation flow]
            (internal placeholder) {?r2}
 ?X13684==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2
            (do_subrelation:=Morphisms.do_subrelation)
            |- Proper (respectful ?r1 ?r2) rs]
            (internal placeholder) {?p2}
 ?X13685==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 |-
            Relation_Definitions.relation flow]
            (internal placeholder) {?r3}
 ?X13686==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2
            (do_subrelation:=Morphisms.do_subrelation)
            |-
            Proper (respectful ?r2 ?r3)
              (seq (ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1))))]
            (internal placeholder) {?p3}
 ?X13699==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 |-
            Relation_Definitions.relation flow]
            (internal placeholder) {?r4}
 ?X13700==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2
            (do_subrelation:=Morphisms.do_subrelation)
            |-
            Proper
              (respectful ?r3
                 (respectful ?r4 (flip impl)))
              (entails_under toss_n_env)]
            (internal placeholder) {?p4}
 ?X13701==[n acc H x a H0 IH1 a1 H1 H2 |-
            Morphisms.ProperProxy ?r4
              (∃ b : int,
                 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                         \[b >= a + n /\
                           (If acc = true then r = 1
                            else r = 0)]))]
            (internal placeholder) {?p5}
TYPECLASSES:?X13677 ?X13678 ?X13679 ?X13680 ?X13681
?X13682 ?X13683 ?X13684 ?X13685 ?X13686 ?X13699
?X13700 ?X13701
SHELF:||
FUTURE GOALS STACK:?X13701 ?X13700 ?X13699 ?X13686
?X13685 ?X13684 ?X13683 ?X13682 ?X13681 ?X13680
?X13679 ?X13678 ?X13677||

n: int
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
IH1: forall y : int,
downto 0 y n ->
forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" y in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[y >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + y /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
H2: toss_n_env ⊢ unk "k" false
⊑ ∀ n acc : val,
    rs
      (let v0 =
       let r2 =
       let r1 = ens r. \[r = false]
       in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
          in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
       in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
       in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0]))
toss_n_env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
  rs
    (let r =
     ens r. \[If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0]
     in let r2 = unk "k" false
        in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

             \[b >= a + n /\
               (If acc = true then r0 = 1 else r0 = 0)])

⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])
 
n: int
acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0
IH1: forall acc : bool,
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1) in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b >= a + (n - 1) /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
toss_n_env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a1 + 1));;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     rs
       (let v0 =
        let r2 =
        let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand false r2])
        in (ens r. \[r = vand false r2])
        in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0]))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int

a1: int

r: val

  req (x ~~> (a1 + 1))
    (req \[n - 1 >= 0]
       (∃ x0 : int,
          rs
            (let r2 =
             ens r. x ~~> x0 \*
                    \[x0 >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If false = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))))

a: int

a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0
toss_n_env
⊢ req ?Goal0
    (ens_ ?Goal1;;
     req \[n - 1 >= 0]
       (∃ x0 : int,
          rs
            (let r2 =
             ens r. x ~~> x0 \*
                    \[x0 >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If false = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

r: val

biab ?Goal0 (x ~~> (a1 + 1)) (x ~~> (a1 + 1)) ?Goal1

acc: bool

 applys b_pts_single.

acc: bool

x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0
toss_n_env
⊢ req \[a1 + 1 = a1 + 1]
    (ens_ \[];;
     req \[n - 1 >= 0]
       (∃ x0 : int,
          rs
            (let r2 =
             ens r. x ~~> x0 \*
                    \[x0 >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If false = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2]))))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

acc: bool
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
H0: n >= 0
a1: int
H1: a1 >= a + 1 + (n - 1)
r: val
H2: If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0
toss_n_env
⊢ ens_ \[];;
  req \[n - 1 >= 0]
    (∃ x0 : int,
       rs
         (let r2 =
          ens r. x ~~> x0 \*
                 \[x0 >= a1 + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                   (If false = true then r = 1
                    else r = 0)]
          in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : int,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \*
            \[b >= a + n /\
              (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)])

Qed.

End Toss.

Module Main.

Definition main n : flow :=
  rs (
    bind (unk "toss_n" (vint n)) (fun v =>
    ens (fun r => \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))).

Definition main_spec_weaker n : flow :=
  ∀ x a,
    req (x~~>vint a \* \[vgt (vint n) 0])
      (∃ b, ens (fun r => x~~>b \* \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1])).

Import Toss.

(*
  This statement differs from the proved lemma above in two ways:

  1. using entails instead of entails_under, which is justified because the proof of main also uses toss_n_env. This sidesteps the need for framing away the additions to the environment in main proof due to dynamic functions.

  2. not including extra existential f due to defun, which is not observable if the name is fresh.
*)
Definition lemma_weaker := forall (n:int) (acc:bool),
  entails

    (rs (bind
      (bind (unk "toss_n" n) (fun r2 =>
        ens (fun r => \[r = vand acc r2])))
      (fun v => ens (fun r => \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))))

    (∀ x a, req (x~~>vint a \* \[n >= 0])
      (∃ b, ens (fun r => x~~>vint b \*
        \[b > a+n /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))).


forall n : int,
exists f : flow,
  lemma_weaker ->
  toss_n_env ⊢ main n ⊑ f;; main_spec_weaker n


forall n : int,
exists f : flow,
  lemma_weaker ->
  toss_n_env ⊢ main n ⊑ f;; main_spec_weaker n

  
forall n : int,
exists f : flow,
  lemma_weaker ->
  toss_n_env
  ⊢ rs
      (let v = unk "toss_n" n
       in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
  ⊑ f;;
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
         (∃ b : Val.value,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1])))
 
n: int
exists f : flow,
  lemma_weaker ->
  toss_n_env
  ⊢ rs
      (let v = unk "toss_n" n
       in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
  ⊑ f;;
    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
         (∃ b : Val.value,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1])))


  
n: int
lemma_weaker ->
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = unk "toss_n" n
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 =
                 unk "toss_n"
                   (viop (fun x y : int => x - y) n 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                  \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1])))


  
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = unk "toss_n" n
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 =
                 unk "toss_n"
                   (viop (fun x y : int => x - y) n 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[vgt n 0])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                  \[vge b (vadd a n) /\ r = 1])))


  
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = toss_n n
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

  
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     disj (ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0])
       (ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
        let r1 = toss vunit
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2]))
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

  
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ disj
    (rs
       (let v = ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0]
        in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
    (rs
       (let v =
        ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
        let r1 = toss vunit
        in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
           in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
        in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

  
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v = ens r. \[r = true /\ veq n 0]
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])

                           else r = 0])))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

lem: lemma_weaker
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     ens_ \[vgt n 0];;
     let r1 = toss vunit
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (vsub n 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))

     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =
              let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
              in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
              in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                           else r = 0])))));;

     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
toss_n_env
⊢ rs
    (let v =
     let r1 =
     sh "k"
       (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
          let r1 =
          req (x ~~> a)
            (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
          in (∀ b : int,
                let r2 =
                req (x ~~> b)
                  (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
                   unk "k" false)
                in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
     in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
     in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ (∃ k : var,
     disj empty
       (defun k
          (fun v : val =>
           rs
             (let v0 =

                 in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])

                           else r = 0])))));;

     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])

          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))

    (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       let r1 =
       req (x ~~> a)
         (ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));; unk "k" true)
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ disj empty
    (defun "k"
       (fun v : val =>
        rs
          (let v0 =
           let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
           in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
              in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
           in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                        else r = 0]))));;
  (∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
     req (x ~~> a \* \[(n > 0)%Z])
       (∃ b : Val.value,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])))
 
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
forall b : var,
shift_free
  (disj empty
     (defun b
        (fun v : val =>
         rs
           (let v0 =
            let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
            in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
               in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
            in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                         else r = 0])))))
 shiftfree.

       in (∀ b : int,

    (* recursive case; use the defun *)

n: int
lem: forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" n in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b > a + n /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  rs
    (let r1 =
     rs
       (let v0 =
        let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand true r2])
        in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0]))
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

    
n: int
lem: forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" n in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b > a + n /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  rs
    (let r1 =
     ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
         (∃ b : int,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[b > a + (n - 1) /\
                      (If true = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]))
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

    (* framing lemma *)
    (* subst.
    lets: ent_env_frame lemma_weaker2_under.
    admit.
    rewrite H0.
    lazymatch goal with
    | |- entails_under ?e _ _ => remember e as env

    clear H0. *)

    
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ∀ x0 : loc,
    ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
    rs
      (let r1 =
       ∀ a : int,
         req (x0 ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
           (∃ b : int,
              (ens r. x0 ~~> b \*
                      \[b > a + (n - 1) /\
                        (If true = true then r = 1
                         else r = 0)]))
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ∀ x0 : int,
    ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
    rs
      (let r1 =
       req (x ~~> x0 \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
         (∃ b : int,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[b > x0 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If true = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]))
       in (∀ b : int,
             let r2 =
             req (x ~~> b)
               (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
             in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])
 
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a: int
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (a + 1));;
  rs
    (let r1 =
     req (x ~~> (a + 1) \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
       (∃ b : int,
          (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                  \[b > a + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                    (If true = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0)]))
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

    (let r1 = ens r. \[r = 0]
     in (∀ b : int,
           let r2 =
           req (x ~~> b)
             (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));; unk "k" false)
           in (ens r3. \[r3 = vadd r1 r2])))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])
 false* C.

lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a, b: int
H0: b > a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1 else r = 0])))
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> b);;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     req (x ~~> b)
       (ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
        rs
          (let v0 =
           let r1 = ens r. \[r = false]
           in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
              in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
           in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                        else r = 0])))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

n: int
lem: forall (n : int) (acc : bool),
rs
(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" n in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b > a + n /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a, b: int
H0: b > a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     rs
       (let v0 =
        let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
        in (ens r. \[r = vand false r2])
        in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0]))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

(let v = let r2 = unk "toss_n" n in (ens r. \[r = vand acc r2])
in (ens r. \[If v = true then r = 1 else r = 0]))
⊑ ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
 req (x ~~> a \* \[n >= 0])
(∃ b : int,
 (ens r. x ~~> b \*
\[b > a + n /\ (If acc = true then r = 1 else r = 0)]))

  rs
    (let r2 =
     ∀ (x : loc) (a : int),
       req (x ~~> a \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
         (∃ b : int,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[b > a + (n - 1) /\
                      (If false = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))

    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

    ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
    rs
      (let r2 =
       req (x ~~> x0 \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
         (∃ b : int,
            (ens r. x ~~> b \*
                    \[b > x0 + (n - 1) /\
                      (If false = true then r = 1
                       else r = 0)]))
       in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                     match r2 with
                     | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                     | _ => vunit
                     end]))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])
 
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a, b: int
H0: b > a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
env
⊢ ens_ (x ~~> (b + 1));;
  rs
    (let r2 =
     req (x ~~> (b + 1) \* \[n - 1 >= 0])
       (∃ b0 : int,
          (ens r. x ~~> b0 \*
                  \[b0 > b + 1 + (n - 1) /\
                    (If false = true then r = 1
                     else r = 0)]))
     in (ens r3. \[r3 =
                   match r2 with
                   | vint i2 => 1 + i2
                   | _ => vunit
                   end]))
⊑ ∃ b : Val.value,
    (ens r. x ~~> b \* \[vge b (a + n) /\ r = 1])

⊑ ens r. x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1]

    
n: int
lem: lemma_weaker
H: (n > 0)%Z
x: loc
a, b: int
H0: b > a + 1 + (n - 1)
C: True
env: Fmap.fmap var ufun
Heqenv: env =
Fmap.update toss_n_env "k"
  (fun v : val =>
   rs
     (let v0 =
      let r1 = ens r. \[
      r = v]
      in let r2 = unk "toss_n" (n - 1)
         in (ens r. \[r = vand r1 r2])
      in (ens r. \[If v0 = true then 
                   r = 1 else 
                   r = 0])))
b1: int
H1: b1 > b + 1 + (n - 1)
C0: True
(fun x0 : val => \[x0 = 1 + 0] \* x ~~> b1) ===>
(fun r : val => x ~~> b1 \* \[vge b1 (a + n) /\ r = 1])
